summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PG Manager Pro application. Backend APIs working at 93.8% success rate, frontend UI fully functional with minor chart rendering issues. All core PG management features operational including login, dashboard KPIs, CRUD operations for properties/rooms/residents/payments/complaints/staff/notices, and reporting functionality.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Update Property operation failed during testing
flaky_endpoints.impact: Property updates may not work consistently

flaky_endpoints.issue: Create Resident operation failed during testing
flaky_endpoints.impact: New resident creation may have validation issues

ui_bugs.issue: Chart containers showing width(-1) and height(-1) error
CSV and PDF export buttons not working

issues: React accessibility warnings for DialogContent components

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@pgmanager.com / admin123
Dashboard KPIs display (Total Properties: 4, Total Rooms: 37, Residents: 15)
Dashboard charts rendering (30 chart elements found)
Properties page navigation and property cards display
Add property modal and form functionality
Rooms table display and add room modal
Residents page with seeded data (15 residents)
Add resident modal functionality
Payments page with summary cards (Total, Paid, Pending, Overdue)
Create invoice modal functionality
Maintenance page with complaint summary cards
Staff page navigation and table display
Reports page with all 4 tabs (Revenue, Occupancy, Dues, Maintenance)
Notices page with seeded notices display
Settings page navigation
All navigation menu items working
Recent payments and complaints sections on dashboard
Payment status filtering and resident filtering
Maintenance complaint status and category filtering
Staff role and property filtering
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chart container sizing issues causing width/height -1 errors. Investigate and fix CSV/PDF export functionality - likely authentication or CORS related. Consider adding proper logout button in user menu. Address React accessibility warnings for modal components.
